poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: O Allah, when the chests of the afflicted are constricted by prolonged grief, do not test them further

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: O Allah, do not leave the homes of travelers empty when the master who narrowed the paths comes to them

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
text_corrected: ويا الله لا تخلي بيوت المسافير
translation_en: The clouds torment me and the birds sadden me, and I don't wish to walk upon this earth

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: In my eyes, the world is little from much, like a locust that whoever catches it roasts it

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: People have their direction and I have mine different, and every living being has a passion they pursue

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: Days are mixed, their clarity with turbidity, and Allah is generous and we hope for His mercy

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
text_whisper: والارض ما كان ودي يمشي عليها
text_corrected: والأرض ما كن ودي امشي عليها
translation_en: I am patient and content with fate, expecting an hour of relief that I await

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: My sustenance is from Allah, when some arrangements honor is just a handful of papers you buy

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: I swore not to return, people are destined, and if my morsel humiliates me I don't desire it

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: Some people are like sparrows over what they have, and some Allah gave and made it pleasant for them

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: But among merchants how many are corrupt, chivalry has washed its hands of them

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And how many poor ones guide the travelers, poetry's glory and its people protect it

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: I hold affection and appreciation for the good, and remember those of noble deeds and point to them

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: They say horses imitate the donkey's forehead, I praise some people with it and satirize others

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: O my friend, time has turned and Allah is the protector, from you a step reaches what it steps

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: Whoever has shortcomings from what he loves, tries to lower his head and protect it

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And tries to find any justification for shortcomings, and as long as they're around him he wants to contain them

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: You can say it's a crisis that passed well, and I emerged from a whirlpool I was in

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And you can say they were storms and hurricanes, I stood and declared my victory over them

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: When some plans/arrangements

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: His dignity is a handful of papers you can buy

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: I swore? He didn't respond, and people are sources/witnesses

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And if your morsel would humiliate me, I don't desire it

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
text_whisper: ناس علي ما بحش مثل العصافير
text_corrected: ناس على ما بهش مثل العصافير
translation_en: People are carefree like birds

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And people whom God gave to and made them blessed

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
text_whisper: لكن من التجار كم من عذيبير
text_corrected: لكن من التجار كم من عثيبير
translation_en: But among the merchants, how many are deceitful

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: Chivalry has washed its hands of him

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: How many poor people astonish the wealthy
imagery_tags_en: poor person, wealthy class, social contrast

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: The glory of poetry, and no one can protect it

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: I hold deep affection and appreciation for goodness

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And I remember those with tall stature and point to them

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
text_whisper: وقالوا تحذى الخيل من جبهة العيل
text_corrected: وقالوا تحذى الخيل من جبهة العير
translation_en: And they said horses take warning from the donkey's forehead

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: With it I praise some people and satirize others

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
text_whisper: يا صاحبي جار الدهر والله مجيد
text_corrected: يا صاحبي جار الدهر والله مجير
translation_en: O my friend, time has been unjust, but God is the protector

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And from you, a step reaches whoever takes it

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
text_corrected: لي جشّني لي مما يحبه تقاصير
translation_en: When he prepared for me what he loves, shortcomings appeared

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: He tries to lower his head and protect it

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And he tries to find any justification for the shortcomings

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: As long as she is around him, he wants to embrace her

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
text_whisper: تقدر تقول أزمة وعدت علي خير
text_corrected: تقدر تقول أزمة وعدت على خير
translation_en: You can say the crisis has passed peacefully

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And I emerged from a whirlpool I was in

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: And you can say that they are storms and hurricanes

poem_title: يا الله لي ضاقت صدور المناعير
translation_en: I stood and declared my victory over her
He says, O evil time, where are the friends of halfway
They changed direction and extinguished the lanterns of trust, and if you ask their ruins, they answer your news is old
Their sun has set, O you whose sun is still shining, the belt knows from the beginning

text_corrected: وان سألت أطلالهم جاوبت خبرك عتيق
translation_en: From the equipment it tightens, and later the belt breaks and no longer has a tear

text_whisper: شمسهم غابت يلي عاد شمسك مشرقة
text_corrected: شمسهم غابت يا اللي عاد شمسك مشرقة
translation_en: I testify that in the heart from friends is a deep wound, and I testify that in the throat is a tear and in the chest a sob
I testify that the hope of the departed is a flowing mirage, and I testify that the rope of hope is like the rope of the gallows
I testify that some estrangement is right and I am deserving of it, and I testify I am right against all who have wronged
I testify that truth has left me no friend, and I testify that society believes its lies
I testify that some Arabs drown in a pitcher's pour, and some wouldn't drown even if a bucket pursued them
May God cut the rope of whoever doesn't make his rope tight, and may he stumble from his wandering, and to camels his sweat
O my existence, find the departed and catch up with them, and if bad luck returns, they are a rifle
O poisons of summer heat, there's no longer a leafy branch, the last branches of friendship on a scorching day
I learned when I divorced them the day I became free, and the bad one is like a woman - two witnesses and a paper
And I bear witness that my hope is fulfilled
A mirage that flows/runs smoothly

text_whisper: واشهد حبل الرجاء مثل حبل المشرقة
text_corrected: وأشهد أن حبل الرجاء مثل حبل المشنقة
translation_en: And I bear witness that the rope of hope is like the rope of the gallows
And I bear witness that some harshness is justified
And I am truly worthy of it
And I testify that I am most foolish
Upon everyone who has righteousness within them

text_whisper: واشهد أن الصدق ما عاد خلال صديق
text_corrected: وأشهد أن الصدق ما عاد خلا لي صديق
translation_en: And I bear witness that honesty no longer left me a friend
And I bear witness that society
Whoever lied to him, he believed

text_whisper: واشهد بعض العرب تغرق صبا تبريك
text_corrected: واشهد أن بعض العرب تغرقه صبة ابريق
translation_en: And I witness that some Arabs are drowned by the pour of a teapot

text_whisper: وأن بعضهم لو يهجده قنيف مغرق
text_corrected: وأن بعضهم لو يهجده قنيف ما أغرقه
translation_en: And some of them, if a small wave hits them, they would not drown

text_whisper: قطع الله حبل من لا جعل حبله وثيق
text_corrected: قطع الله حبل من لا جعل حبله وثيق
translation_en: May God sever the rope of one who does not make his rope strong
And he is broken from his dispersion
And the camels have their lineage
O my existence, a locked/closed passion
And they caught up with him, the pursuit
And if bad luck returns again
And they are a rifle
Oh scorching winds of summer heat
imagery_tags_en: desert wind, summer heat, scorching air

translation_en: There is no longer any branch or leaf
The last branches of friendship
A scorching day
I was told that you divorced them
The day I am free and unbound
And the response is like bitterness, two witnesses and a paper
Don't wave to the traveler, the traveler has gone
The streetlights have wilted and extinguished
The light of letters
Come my heart, let's go
The world has become narrow upon us
The train
Missed us and the traveler has gone
I don't know tomorrow
This city
What will it become
The day
And the yellow rose
And the branches, this is your traveling face
When I had
Eyes
Where are my eyes, my beloved

text_whisper: سافرت مثلك حبيبي القطار وفاتنا ومسافر
text_corrected: سافرت مثلك حبيبي القطار وفاتنا ومسافر
translation_en: I traveled like you my beloved, the train missed us and is traveling

text_corrected: سلامة رماحك الي جرحها غالي جرحتني غاضب لين انكسر رمحك
translation_en: Peace be upon your spears whose wounds are precious / You wounded me in anger until your spear broke
Justice and satisfaction in love / Your slaughter, my master
And if you intend to increase my exile / Tell me and I'll distance my darkness from your morning's light
If it doesn't please you / I'll lengthen the sun with my mountains

text_whisper: قل لي ونبعد ظلامي عن سنة صبحك
text_corrected: قل لي وأنا ابعد ظلامي عن سنا صبحك
translation_en: And it's not enough that I loved your mountains and slopes / All love in love blooms and struts
And I am the one who in losing my dignity / Gains you
Oh, may trees never bloom in my sands / If I apologize for my pride in hope of your forgiveness
Peace be upon your spears whose wounds are precious / You stabbed me in anger until your spear broke
And it's not enough that I loved your mountains
And your slope poured all the love
In love, he blooms and struts with pride
And I am the one who is at a loss of my dignity
Your profit/gain
Oh, may the trees never bloom
I won't apologize for my pride
In hope of your forgiveness
May your spears be safe, whose wounds are precious
You stabbed me angrily until your spear broke

poem_title: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية
text_whisper: ما بيقالي قلبي اشفعلك خطية ذوبته جروح صدك والخطايا
text_corrected: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية ذوبته جروح صدك والخطايا
translation_en: I have no heart left to intercede for your sin; you melted it with the wounds of your rejection and sins

poem_title: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية
text_whisper: صاحبي بالله لا تعتب عليّ العتب ما عاد تاسعها الحناية
text_corrected: صاحبي بالله لا تعتب عليّ العتب ما عاد تاسعه الحنايا
translation_en: My friend, by God, don't blame me; blame no longer fits within my ribs
imagery_tags_en: ribs, blame, emotional capacity, divine oath

poem_title: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية
text_whisper: كل جرح فاتلي منك هدية وش بلاك تخاف من رد الهدايا
text_corrected: كل جرح فات لي منك هدية، وش بلاك تخاف من رد الهدايا
translation_en: Every wound from you was a gift to me; why do you fear the return of gifts?

poem_title: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية
text_whisper: الله أكبر كيف مالك مقدرية وكل ما تحمله من همي بقايا
text_corrected: الله أكبر، كيف مالك مقدرية؟ وكل ما تحمله من همي بقايا
translation_en: God is Greatest, how do you have no appreciation? All you carry of my burden are mere remnants

poem_title: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية
text_whisper: لا تمنيني سراب المهمهية القراحة اليوم
text_corrected: لا تمنيني سراب المهمهية القراح اليوم
translation_en: Don't tempt me with the mirage of the desert; today, clear water cannot quench my thirst
imagery_tags_en: desert mirage, thirst, clear water, deception

poem_title: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية
text_whisper: ما يروي ضمايا ونغدا للحب في قلبك شغية وش يقول اليوم غدا
text_corrected: ما يروي ظمايا وإن غدا للحب في قلبك شظية وش يقول الي غدا
translation_en: And if tomorrow love remains a splinter in your heart, what would one say whose heart has become shards?

poem_title: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية
translation_en: His heart is shattered into fragments
imagery_tags_en: broken glass, shattered pieces, fragmented heart

text_corrected:
ظماي أنت 
ومن يعشق ظماه غيري
 وجروحي أنت
 ومن يكره دواه غيري 
اسقني لو ما ارتويت
وداوني لو ماشكيت
ماهقيت اني اعطش في حياتي لغيرك انت
و ما دريت
translation_en: You are my thirst, and who else but me loves their thirst? You are my wounds, and who else but me hates their cure?

text_whisper: إنما به أغلى منك إلا أنت يا ضمائي يا ضمائي أنت
text_corrected: إن ما به أغلى منك إلا أنت يا ظمائي يا ظمائي أنت
translation_en: There is nothing more precious to me than you, O my thirst, O my thirst, you are

text_whisper: ما تخيل أن عيني مرة تغفى وما تشوفك
text_corrected: ما اتخيل أن عيني مرة تغفى وما تشوفك
translation_en: I cannot imagine my eyes closing once without seeing you

text_whisper: وما تخيل لو يطول الصمت ما أسمع حروفك
text_corrected: وما اتخيل لو يطول الصمت ما أسمع حروفك
translation_en: And I cannot imagine if silence lengthens that I won't hear your letters
You know my feeling of your fear is my wishes

text_whisper: لما تسأل عني ليلة عن مكاني
text_corrected: لما تسأل عني ليلة عن مكاني
translation_en: When you ask about me one night, about my place

text_whisper: ما تخيل كيف تحرقني الثواني شمعة في ليل انتظارك
text_corrected: ما اتخيل كيف تحرقني الثواني شمعة في ليل انتظارك
translation_en: I cannot imagine how the seconds burn me, a candle in the night of waiting for you

text_whisper: وكيف يسبقني زماني من عطش ليل النهارك
text_corrected: وكيف يسبقني زماني من عطش ليلي لنهارك
translation_en: And how my time races ahead of me from my night's thirst for your day
Give me an appointment and forget the appointment
But don't abandon and distance yourself

text_corrected:
بس لا تهجر وتبعد 
واسقني لو ما ارتويت
translation_en: And quench me even if I'm not satisfied
And heal me even if I don't complain
O my thirst, O my thirst, you are

text_whisper: يا ضماء قلبي لقلبي وغربة عيوني عن عيوني
text_corrected:
يا ظمأ قلبي لقلبي
 وغربة عيوني عن عيوني
translation_en: O thirst of my heart for my heart, and estrangement of my eyes from my eyes

text_whisper: وين كنت يا ترى الليلة في صدري
text_corrected: وينك أنت؟ يا ترى الليلة في صدري
translation_en: Where are you? I wonder, tonight in my chest

text_whisper: او في جفني في الشعور اللي خطفني ودار بالدنيا
text_corrected: او في جفني في الشعور اللي خطفني ودار بي الدنيا
translation_en: Or in my eyelid, in the feeling that seized me and spun the world around me

text_whisper: وعود يسأل الدنيا حبيبي وين كنت
text_corrected: و عوّد اسأل الدنيا حبيبي وينك أنت
translation_en: And I got used to asking the world: my beloved, where are you?
Oh, if only you knew my longing
O thirst of the world in my veins

text_whisper: اسقني لو مرتويت وداوني لو ما شكيت
text_corrected: اسقني لو ما ارتويت وداوني لو ما شكيت
translation_en: Quench me even if I'm not satisfied, and heal me even if I don't complain
O my thirst, O my thirst, you are

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: O moon, your paths have begun to change

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: How slow your rising, how swift your setting

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_whisper: يا بطي مطلاعك ويا سرع مسراك
text_corrected: يا بطي مطلاعك ويا سرع مسراك
translation_en: The stars that once competed with you have faded, no star appeared before you or abandoned you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: The day before yesterday I counted nights for you and watched over you, today you're distant and hidden from me

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: O Najd, may the rain clouds water you, quenching your thirst and irrigating your dry lands

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: O Najd, my heart benefits when it mentions you, God blames whoever blames it except when mentioning you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: You didn't know it cherishes and values you, a heart nourished by your food and water

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: The eye in dark nights converses with you, even in London it feels in your protection

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_whisper: ما شفت نجم باق قبلك وخواك
text_corrected: ما شفت نجم بان قبلك وخاواك
translation_en: O Najd we loved you, we loved you for the love of your shepherd

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_corrected: قبل أمس أعد لك الليالي وأراعيك
translation_en: Who built your glory, protected and shaped you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: Security and faith dwell within you, the grace of the King who was raised in you and pleased you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_whisper: يا نجد جعلهم روح الغيث يسقيك
text_corrected: يا نجد جعلهم مروّح الغيث يسقيك
translation_en: O Najd, may the evening rain clouds water you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: May He quench your thirst and water your parched ones

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_whisper: يا نجد قلب ينفع يوم يطريك
text_corrected: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: O Najd, my heart benefits when it mentions you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_corrected: الله يلوم اللي يلومه الا طراك
translation_en: May God blame whoever blames him except for your sake

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_corrected: تو ما دريت أنه يعزك ويغليك
translation_en: I didn't know that he cherishes and values you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_corrected: قلبٍ تغذَّى من طعامك ومن ماءك
translation_en: A heart that was nourished by your food and your water

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: The eye in the dark nights whispers to you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_whisper: لو هي بلندن كانها اليوم بحماك
text_corrected: لو هي بلندن كانها اليوم بحماك
translation_en: If she were in London, it would be as if she were today in your protection

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: O Najd, we have loved you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_whisper: يا نجد حبيناك من حب راعيك
text_corrected: يا نجد حبيناك من حب راعيك
translation_en: O Najd, we loved you for the love of your shepherd

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: The one who built your glory, protected you and made you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
translation_en: Security and faith have settled within you

poem_title: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
text_whisper: فضل المليك اللي رُبَى فيك وارضاك
text_corrected: فضل المليك اللي رُبَى فيك وارضاك
translation_en: The grace of the King who raised you and pleased you
I kiss his nose and ask him how he is
And my love for him has no greed behind it
I respect him and share in his sorrows
While I know he's an enemy with vile nature
My separation and his separation, may God scatter his ribs

text_whisper: الحقد من قلبه على الكبد مايع
text_corrected: الحقد من قلبه على الكبد مايع
translation_en: Hatred from his heart flows liquid on the liver
Apply kohl to your enemy until you blind his eyes

text_whisper: لبس الهغلة اللبس لو كنت جايع
text_corrected: البس له أغلى اللبس لو كنت جايع
translation_en: Dress him in the finest clothes even if you're hungry

text_whisper: لو عشت عمرو شعيب وانتم هونه
text_corrected: لو عشت عمر شعيب وانت بمهونة
translation_en: If you live Shuaib's age while in humiliation
You're wasted and won't fulfill your life's purpose
Honor is lost the day
A man risks himself for it
Others' lives are like your life
Deposits, and when you find people of this time
Complaining about it, don't complain about your time
To every wasteful person

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: جعل السحابة اللي معه برق ورعود
text_corrected: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
translation_en: May the clouds that carry lightning and thunder

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: يمطر على دار ولي في سكنها
translation_en: Rain upon the dwelling where my beloved resides

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_corrected: يسقي وطن منتوقة العنق يا سعود
translation_en: Water the homeland of the long-necked beauty, O Saud

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: ما لي وطن بلعار ظل وطنها
text_corrected: ما لي وطن بالعارض إلا وطنها
translation_en: I have no homeland in Al-Aridh except hers

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
translation_en: My heart has become captive, soft as a tender branch

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: جعل السحابة اللي معه برق ورعود
text_corrected: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
translation_en: No one can free my heart from her, O Saud

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: يمطر على دار ولي في سكنها
translation_en: Armed with flint and gunpowder in his hand

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_corrected: يسقي وطن منتوقة العنق يا سعود
translation_en: He enters his hand between the ribs and buries it

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: ما لي وطن بل عار غلى وطنها
text_corrected: ما لي وطن بالعارض إلا وطنها
translation_en: Between me and him are bonds, secrets, and covenants

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
translation_en: Protected, unknown to people about it

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_corrected: محد يفك القلب يا سعود منها
translation_en: Each year his love increases more and more, I follow with my soul twisted in her reins

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
translation_en: I die between the cheek and the black eyes, and eyebrows that God adorned with beauty

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
translation_en: Hair perfumed with musk and rose, a braid that embraces me as I embrace it

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
translation_en: A night that gathered us, may it return again, to distance the sad soul from its sorrow

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
translation_en: She is protected/preserved, people know nothing about her
imagery_tags_en: hidden pearl, veiled woman, guarded treasure

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: في كل عام يزود حبه بعد زود أقفها بروحي والتوافير سنها
text_corrected: في كل عام يزود حبه بعد زود أقفى بروحي والتوى في رسنها
translation_en: Every year his love increases more and more, I follow with my soul while the bridle twists in its rein

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: أموت بين الخد وعيونها السود وحواجب الربين ملحه قرنها
text_corrected: أموت بين الخد وعيونه السود وحواجب ربي بملحه قرنها
translation_en: I die between the cheek and his black eyes, and eyebrows that God adorned with beauty
imagery_tags_en: cheeks, black eyes, eyebrows, physical beauty

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: وشعرهم دهن المسك والورد مكتود جديل تنتظمني واحتضنها
text_corrected: وشعر بدهن المسك والورد مكثود جديلةٍ تضمني واحتضنها
translation_en: And hair perfumed with musk oil and rose, thickly braided, a plait that embraces me and I embrace it
imagery_tags_en: hair, musk, rose, perfume, braid, embrace

poem_title: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
text_whisper: ليلة انجمعني بعسليت ويعودي بعد عن النفس الحزينة حزنها
text_corrected: ليلٍ جمعني به عسى ليته يعود يبعد عن النفس الحزينة حزنها
translation_en: A night that brought us together, may it return to distance sorrow from the grieving soul
From my mind I ask you about knowledge and news

text_corrected: ومن راسي انشدكم بالعلوم والأخبار لأن منكم وفيكم
translation_en: Because from you and within you / Yes from us and within us
I didn't come to remind or repeat poetry

text_whisper: ولا جيت للتذكير أو شعر للتكرار
text_corrected: ولا جيت للتذكير أو شعر للتكرار
translation_en: But I said to reinforce an idea that elevates us
In the Year of Zayed, goodness rejoices / And the righteous, our poems sprout and our songs bloom
imagery_tags_en: Year of Zayed, poems blooming, songs

translation_en: From Oman, mother of the loyal, came her righteous son

text_whisper: ولا خيار وتنبت قصايدنا وتورق أغانينا
translation_en: As long as we are from her, we pride ourselves in our names

text_whisper: من عمان أم الأوفية جاء ولدها البار
text_corrected: من عمان أم الأوفياء جاء ولدها البار
translation_en: My country has the two swords and the cutting dagger
It severs the head that thinks to harm her
From the land of Qaboos whose hand is generous

text_whisper: تمصر به الراس الذي ظني أذينا
text_corrected: تمصر به الراس الذي ظن يأذيها
translation_en: You know him when your eyes see our lands

text_whisper: من ديار قابوس الذي كفه المدرار
text_corrected: من ديار قابوس الذي كفه المدرار
translation_en: To the land of dignity, Zayed's chosen jewel
Emirates, and the name's definition suffices us
To the house of Khalifa who fathered a mighty leader
His face, when seeing the nation, says 'revive us'

text_whisper: لدار الخليفة اللي ولد قائد جرار
text_corrected: لدار الخليفة اللي ولد قائد جرار
translation_en: A nation whose falcon, when it rises, ignites the fire's fuse

text_whisper: وله وجه لا شاف الوطن قال يحيينا
text_corrected: وله وجه لا شاف الوطن قال يحيينا
translation_en: Aggression retreats from her, may God protect us

text_whisper: بلاد صقرها انفز خاشر فتيل النار
text_corrected: بلاد صقرها ان فز خاشر فتيل النار
translation_en: November 18th they bring flowers, we find the entrances calling us with joy
December 2nd we decorate with lights, we have a holiday that concerns you, you have a holiday that concerns us

text_whisper: ثم انطعش نوفمبر تسوقوا له الأزهار نلاقي المنافذ من فرحاتنا دينا
text_corrected: ثمانية عشر نوفمبر تسوقوا له الأزهار نلاقي المنافذ من فرحها تنادينا
translation_en: Mohammed bin Rashid initiates and we don't hesitate, he says victory is one, establishing our principles

text_whisper: واثنين ديسمبر نزيل له الأنوار لنا عيد يعنيكم لكم عيد يعنينا
text_corrected: واثنين ديسمبر نزيّن له الأنوار لنا عيد يعنيكم، لكم عيد يعنينا
translation_en: And when Mohammed bin Zayed the brave blesses

text_whisper: ومحمد ابن راشد يبادر ولا نحتار يقول النصر واحد يأصل مبادينا
text_corrected: ومحمد بن راشد يبادر ولا نحتار يقول النصر واحد يأصّل مبادينا
translation_en: Be assured he honors us in our congratulations

text_whisper: وإذا بارك محمد ابن زايد المغوار
text_corrected: وإذا بارك محمد بن زايد المغوار
translation_en: We have blood in the tribes' veins dyed free
Be assured that he has honored us in our congratulations

text_whisper: لنا دم في عروق القبائل الصبغ أحرار
text_corrected: لنا دم في عروق القبائل صبغ أحرار
translation_en: We have blood in the veins of tribes that dyed the free ones
It binds in our present with the covenant of our past

text_whisper: ومن قال هذه دار والثانية هي دار
text_corrected: ومن قال هذه دار والثانية هي دار
translation_en: And whoever said this is a home and the other is a home

text_whisper: أقول الجسد واحد وذي لا يدينا
text_corrected: أقول الجسد واحد و ذيلا أيادينا
translation_en: I say the body is one and these are our hands

text_whisper: ومن قال طيب جار ومجاورا له جار
text_corrected: ومن قال طيب جار ومجاورٍ له جار
translation_en: And whoever says a good neighbor and one who neighbors him is a neighbor
I tell him one verse
And by it we were raised
And when you see the boundaries of our lands
There is no wall upon it
So know that we will protect it
And she will protect us
So know that we will protect it
And she will protect us
Our relationships grow
And we remain with great minds
And when we hear of separation
Our ears laugh together

text_whisper: وإن شفنا سايق فتنة نقبض الدوار
text_corrected: وإن شفنا سايق فتنة نقبضه الدوّار
translation_en: And if we see someone driving sedition, we arrest him at the roundabout

text_whisper: ويرجع من الفتنة حذر من خطاوينا
text_corrected: ويرجع من الفتنة حذر من خطاوينا
translation_en: And he returns from the discord, wary of our missteps

text_whisper: ومنفكر في تأويل أو حيرت هشوار
text_corrected: ومن فكر في تأويل أو حيرته أشوار
translation_en: And whoever contemplates interpretation or is confused by thorns/difficulties
He looks at our chairs to know our anchors/moorings

text_whisper: قفض عمره قصيدي وسلم سلام منحار
text_corrected: قفض عمره قصيدي وسلم سلامٍ حار
translation_en: My poem ended its life and delivered a burning greeting

text_whisper: بعد ما رسل أمواج حبه إلى المرء
text_corrected: بعد ما رسل أمواج حبه إلى الإمارات
translation_en: After he sent waves of his love to the Emirates

text_whisper: على الهون يا جرح المفارق وضيق البال
text_corrected: على الهون يا جرح المفارق وضيق البال
translation_en: Take it easy, O wound of separation and distress of mind / Take it easy, O sorrow that has overpowered me with its might

text_whisper: على الهون يا هم من صطابي وقدرته
text_corrected: على الهون يا همٍ من سطى بي وقدرته
translation_en: I honor you even as a wound whose struggle is deadly / And I've trained my body for your sickness and made it patient
For the one who possessed my heart from journey to journey / And I opened for them a door that I had closed to others

text_whisper: قد تال وروضت جسمي لجل سقمك
translation_en: I placed shade for them from the scorching sun of passion / And built them a house in my heart and maintained it
I preserved them, pampered them, and sang them songs / And chose their nearness - if only I hadn't chosen it
They grazed the meadow of my heart until the grass became barren / And from its barrenness I kept others away

text_whisper: وفجيت له باب عن الناس سكرته
text_corrected: وفجيت له بابٍ عن الناس سكرته
translation_en: I protect them from anger and anger the critics / Their faults, if great in others' eyes, I minimize

text_whisper: وحطيت له عن شمس قيض الغرام
text_corrected: وحطيت له عن شمس قيظ الغرام
translation_en: I gave them pure water of passion and love / After they drew from my heart's blood

text_whisper: أضلال وشيت له بيت هنا بقلبي
translation_en: Before night covered them with a shawl / I stole sleep from their eyes and kept them awake

text_whisper: وعمرته حفظته ودللته وغنيت له موال
text_corrected: وعمرته حفظته ودللته وغنيت له موال
translation_en: I engraved every letter of mine on the chain / They boasted with it and angered those who envied
After all this appreciation, love and reverence / They changed and their whims overcame them
They multiplied against me - may God judge them / While I gave them my life without counting
I dressed them in arrogance until they came strutting / Growing in their own eyes when illusions deceived them

text_corrected: رعى ريف قلبي لين صار الحشم مدهال
translation_en: If it's all jokes and child's play / I shook the branch until the bird flew away
We finished and locked the boxes with locks / And from their unjust rule, I freed my heart completely

text_whisper: أداري عليه من الزعل وزعل العذال
text_corrected: أداري عليه من الزعل وأزعل العذال
translation_en: I conceal my anger from him while angering the blamers

text_corrected: وخطاه إن كبر في عين غيري
translation_en: And his steps, even if they seem great in others' eyes

text_whisper: تصاغرته سقيته من عدود الغلاء والغرام زلال
text_corrected: تصاغرته سقيته من عدود الغلا والغرام زلال
translation_en: I belittled him, yet gave him to drink from the wells of passion and love's pure water

text_whisper: بعد ما جذب من دم قلبي وصدرته
text_corrected: بعد ما جذب من دم قلبي وصدرته
translation_en: After he drew from my heart's blood and expelled it

text_whisper: وقبل لا يغطي ليلة المنتذر بالشال
text_corrected: وقبل لا يغطي ليله المنتثر بالشال
translation_en: And before the night covers the scattered one with a shawl

text_corrected: سرقت الكرى من نون عينه وسهرته
translation_en: I stole sleep from the pupil of his eye and kept him awake

text_whisper: ونقش كل حرف من حروفي على السلسال
text_corrected: ونقش كل حرف من حروفي على السلسال
translation_en: And I engraved every letter of my letters on the chain
He boasted with it and angered people who confronted him
And after all this appreciation, love, and reverence
He changed and his desires have overcome him

text_whisper: تكاثر علي الله يجازيه كيف الحال
text_corrected: تكاثر علي الله يجازيه كيف الحال
translation_en: May God reward whoever asks me frequently how I am

text_whisper: وأنا يوم سوق العمر له ما تكاثرته
text_corrected: وأنا يوم أسوق العمر له ما تكاثرته
translation_en: And when I drive my life towards him, I do not multiply it

text_whisper: تكاثر علي الله يجازيه كيف الحال
text_corrected: تكاثر علي الله يجازيه كيف الحال
translation_en: May God reward whoever asks me frequently 'how are you?'

text_whisper: وأنا يوم سوق العمر له ما تكاثرته
text_corrected: وأنا يوم أسوق العمر له ما تكاثرته
translation_en: And when I drive my life towards him, I do not multiply it

text_whisper: البسته ثياب الغطر سهلين جاي اختال
text_corrected: لبسته ثياب الغطرسة لين جاء يختال
translation_en: He wore the garments of arrogance until he came strutting

text_whisper: و كبر في عيونه يوم لوها مغررته
text_corrected: و كبر في عيونه يوم الأوهام غررته
translation_en: And he grew arrogant in his eyes when illusions deceived him

text_whisper: و إذا السالفة ضحك و مهازل
text_corrected: و إذا السالفة ضحك و مهازل
translation_en: And if the matter becomes laughter and jokes
Jokes and children's play
I struck the branch
Until the feather flashed and made it fly
We finished and closed the boxes
With locks and from the tyranny of his complete judgment
I freed the heart

text_corrected: يدور الوقت وتبين لنا الأيام سر الغيب وتظهر هيئة المكتوب من رسمه وعنوانه لزمنا الصمت يوم الصمت في بعض المواقف طيب، قفلنا دون وجه الشر بالمفتاح بيبانه، تخطفنا يدين العبث والتزوير والتخريب، يبون يفرقون الشمل ويهدون جدرانه سعوا للنيل منا بالخفا
translation_en: Time revolves and days reveal to us the secret of the unseen, showing the form of what is written from its drawing and title

text_whisper: فبالظلم والتكليب علينا كل واحد حد سكينه ونيبانه
text_corrected: فوق بالظلم والتكذيب علينا كل واحد حد سكينه ونيبانه
translation_en: We were bound to silence when silence in some situations is good, we locked the door against evil with its key
The hands of chaos, forgery and destruction snatch us, they want to divide unity and demolish its walls

text_whisper: ما صابوا لو وصلنا منه باروده ودخانه
text_corrected: ما صاب ولا وصلنا منه باروده ودخانه
translation_en: They sought to harm us secretly with injustice and lies, each one sharpening his knife and fangs against us
I say she is arrogant
If description falls short, she violates it
With her eyelashes, she cuts the tongue of the poem
A figure that needs a topography specialist
To describe the runway of her waist to the platform
Arrogant
If description falls short, she violates it
With her eyelashes, she cuts the tongue of the poem

text_whisper: هيكل يبي عالم تضاريس مختص يوصف مدرج خسرها للمنصة
text_corrected: هيكل يبي عالم تضاريس مختص يوصف مدرج خصرها للمنصة
translation_en: A figure needing a topography specialist to describe her waist's runway to the platform

text_whisper: متقسمة كل شيء خارج على النص
text_corrected: متقسمة كل شيء خارج على النص
translation_en: Divided, everything outside the script
She wronged a dress bound by its text

text_whisper: الكعب يوم الخصر من كتفه ارتص
text_corrected: الكعب يوم الخصر من كتفه ارتص
translation_en: The heel when the waist aligned from its shoulder
The hip aligned the leg and the leg aligned it

text_corrected: مشي المهار إيقاع وان عثرت وغصّ
translation_en: The walk of young camels, rhythm, and if she stumbles and chokes

text_whisper: تك تك تك تك تك تك تك طار نصه
text_corrected: تك تك تك تك تك تك تك طار نصه
translation_en: Tick tick tick tick tick tick tick, half flew away

text_whisper: الساق ليس رزل تك تص تك تص
translation_en: The left leg slipped, compress compress
She limps and the chest of rhyme has a lump

text_whisper: أمزح مع حمدي على إيه بتبص
text_corrected: أمزح مع حمدي على إيه بتبص
translation_en: I joke with Hamdi about what you're looking at

text_whisper: يقول وانت تبص قلت إيه بصه
text_corrected: يقول وانت تبص قلت إيه بصة
translation_en: He says while you look, I said what a look
But it lasted long
But it lasted long, oh boy, my eye

text_whisper: وقول الص يفتح غطل الجفنين ويقول الص
text_corrected: وقول اص يفتح غطا الجفنين ويقول اصه
translation_en: And say 'shh' to open the eyelids and say 'shh'

text_corrected: هداني الوقت غادة وألماس لما انجرح رمشي هدتني هدبها شاعر أدور بعاطفة طفلة احساس تصرخ بوسط الناس ضايع ذهبها آمالها أكبر وأكبر من الباس وأكبر من العذراء ومن هو خطبها وأكبر من القمة وأكبر من الكاس وأكبر من نفو
translation_en: Subscribe to the channel

text_whisper: ما ورق الراعي سوى صوت الأجراس
text_corrected: روس تنام بغضبها ما ورّق الراعي سوى صوت الأجراس
translation_en: The shepherd only rustled with the sound of bells / When these souls swayed to their Arabs
The comfortable one didn't stand for the rest of hardship / The day when beards fear the dignity of its mustache

text_corrected: ما ورّق الراعي سوى صوت الأجراس لما تهادت هالنفوس لعربها ما وقّف المرتاح ترويحة الباس
translation_en: The seed didn't turn on the roaster's head / Except for the fire to love its flame
Every bearded garment is worn by the kind-hearted / And every soul takes from time what pleases it

text_whisper: وما دارت الحبة على راس محماس
text_corrected: وما دارت الحبة على راس محماس
translation_en: How many girls stay awake without sleep passing by / How many girls sleep came to and overcame
How many girls stay awake without sleep passing by / How many girls sleep came to and overcame

text_whisper: كل ثوب لحيا طيب القلب لباس
text_corrected: كل ثوب لحية طيب القلب لباس
translation_en: Yesterday's whispers of nightmares didn't pass / Except to awaken, to leaf through, to pick grapes from my eyes

text_whisper: وكل نفس تاخذ بزما ما عجبها
text_corrected: وكل نفس تاخذ بالزمن ما عجبها
translation_en: The poet who was visited by a thousand obsessions saw the strange girl whose manners diminished from that day / And my heart's rights with people and her rights, I don't know who stole them

text_whisper: كم طفلة تسهر ولا مرها نعاس
text_corrected: كم طفلة تسهر ولا مرها نعاس
translation_en: How many young girls stay awake without feeling sleepy
How many little girls has sleep come to and overcome

text_whisper: كم طفلة تسهر ولا مرها نعاس
text_corrected: كم طفلة تسهر ولا مرها نعاس
translation_en: How many young girls stay awake without feeling sleepy
How many little girls has sleep come to and overcome

text_whisper: ما مرت البارح حواجيس في الناس
translation_en: Last night, the whispers of Firnas did not pass by
Will you not awaken, will you not bloom from
Do not pluck the grapes from my eyes

text_whisper: الشاعر اللي مربه ألف وسواس شاف الغريبة بنت قلت أدبها من يومها
text_corrected: الشاعر اللي مر به ألف وسواس شاف الغريبة بنت قلت أدبها من يومها
translation_en: The poet who was visited by a thousand obsessions saw the strange girl whose manners diminished from that day

text_whisper: وحقوق قلبي مع الناس وحقوقها مدري من اللي سلبها
text_corrected: وحقوق قلبي مع الناس وحقوقها مدري من اللي سلبها
translation_en: And the rights of my heart with people and their rights, I don't know who stole them
